issue.title: telegraf.com.ua
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Annoyance) [https://telegraf.com.ua/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Ftelegraf.com.ua%2F) ### Comment > The popup doesn't appear immediately. When you visit the website, it sets localStorage.subscribe_session_start_time, then it displays the popup after some time. > > Applies to telegraf.ua as well. ### Screenshots
